# DELTA DIY MRI Travel Award Recipient Introduction
---

## Jody Todd

**Affiliation:** Emory University and Georgia Institute of Technology

**Current role:** PhD candidate

**Location:** Atlanta, GA

**Workshop interests:** Data Acquisition, Reconstruction, Console Software

My name is Jody Todd, and I am a PhD candidate at Georgia Tech conducting research at Emory University. My current project is focused on pulse sequence development for 7T cerebrovascular assessment. I'm excited for this opportunity as it will allow me to translate my skills in high-field imaging and to learn about the unique challenges of low-field. My hope at the end of the workshop is to be more knowledgeable of the MRI system as a whole, understand the benefits of low-field imaging, including accessibility, and to take this experience into my future career in an industry/clinical setting :).
